name: devmentorai
description: DevOps mentoring and writing assistant powered by GitHub Copilot

scripts.zip:extension:firefox: pnpm --filter @devmentorai/extension zip:firefox && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const dir = 'apps/extension/.output'; const files = fs.readdirSync(dir); const f = files.find(x => x.endsWith('-firefox.zip')); if (f) { fs.copyFileSync(path.join(dir, f), path.join(dir, f.replace('.zip', '.xpi'))); console.log('[zip] Created Firefox XPI:', f.replace('.zip', '.xpi')); }"
scripts.zip:extension:all: pnpm run zip:extension && pnpm run zip:extension:firefox
scripts.zip:backend: zip -r backend-source.zip apps/backend packages/shared package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml pnpm-lock.yaml -x '**/node_modules/*' '**/dist/*' '**/build/*' '**/.turbo/*' '**/coverage/*' '**/.output/*' '**/.wxt/*'
